services.title: Equipment Rentals
services.body: High-quality sound and lighting equipment rentals

faqs.a: Yes, we offer a range of high-quality audio and lighting gear for rent.

faqs.q: Can you cater to special requests?
faqs.a: Absolutely. We can tailor our services based on your specific event needs.

faqs.q: What types of events do you cover?
faqs.a: We handle weddings, corporate events, parties, and more.

faqs.q: How far in advance should I book?
faqs.a: For best availability, we recommend booking at least 2-3 months ahead.
